articles.title: Apple shares new software tests
articles.summary: Apple gave new software to testers. It's for phones and tablets. They are testing updates.
articles.impact: Developers can test new phone and tablet software.

articles.title: Rocket League gets new look preview
articles.summary: Rocket League will look different. It uses a new game engine. Epic showed a preview.
articles.impact: The game will have a big visual upgrade soon.

articles.title: New Lego city builder game coming?
articles.summary: A new Lego game is hinted. It might be like Cities: Skylines. A rating board listed it.
articles.impact: City builder fans may get a Lego version of the game.

articles.title: Old Windows pinball game gets real version
articles.summary: Classic Space Cadet pinball is back. It will be a real machine. It was a Windows game.
articles.impact: A favorite Windows game is becoming an actual pinball machine.

articles.title: Oppo's Bubble helps rear camera selfies
articles.summary: Oppo made a small screen. It sticks to your phone's back. You can see yourself for photos.
articles.impact: Use your phone's better main cameras for selfies with this accessory.

articles.title: Dragon Quest live stream announced
articles.summary: The Dragon Quest team will stream. They will share news. It's a short broadcast.
articles.impact: Fans will get new information about the Dragon Quest series.

articles.title: Backpack melts on hot Corvette engine
articles.summary: A backpack was on a hot engine. It started to melt. The car is a Corvette C8.
articles.impact: A backpack melted on a car's hot engine.

articles.title: New community features for The Free Press
articles.summary: The Free Press is launching new things. It's for its community. There will be events and talks.
articles.impact: The publication offers new ways for readers to connect.
